pageContext.name: An American Werewolf In London
pageContext.description: 'Beware the moon...'  Sideshow and Vice Press present An American Werewolf In London Fine Art Lithograph by Matt Ferguson!  This 24 x 36 limited edition lithograph print is unframed and hand-numbered on 300gsm archival paper with an authenticity hologram on the reverse. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for horror fans!
